title: v0.4.1 smoke patches — five fixes surfaced during v0.4 Rocky 234 smoke

scope.release: Patch bump — no functional additions. Bundles five fixes that landed on main after the v0.4.0 cut (033db4c) during operator-driven smoke on Rocky 234.
scope.bumps: 0.4.0 → 0.4.1 across 4 package.json + sidebar label + README tarball reference
scope.fixes: install.sh upgrade safety x2 · PostgreSQL 18 PGDATA layout · dockerode ensureImage · clipboard non-secure context fallback

commits.subject: fix(install): skip admin seed in upgrade mode (set -u unbound ADMIN_USERNAME)
fix(databases): postgres:18 default + cross-version PGDATA layout
fix(install): tail-message ADMIN_USERNAME default — set -u survives upgrade
fix(web): clipboard fallback for non-secure (HTTP + non-localhost) contexts

verification.note: All five fixes already on main and individually verified during smoke. This change is meta-only — version-bump + release-record. Verification re-runs guard against bump-induced regressions.

deferredFollowups: v0.4.x-pmm-cards-conditional — drawer PMM cards show '—' when instance not registered with PMM (draft)
v0.X-multihost-pmm-inventory — operator request to surface non-DinoPanel DBs under PMM in /databases (draft, blocked on product-direction decision)
